prose:
**Aniline Fukui Reactivity Indices** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit RKS) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (with ±1 ionic derivatives for f⁺/f⁻ computation). Geometry: user-supplied fixed .xyz, single-point (not geometry-optimized). Mulliken partial charges. SCF converged; charge conservation (Σ f⁺ = 1.0000, Σ f⁻ = 1.0000) verified. **Most electrophilic atom:** C at position 3 (ortho to N), f⁺ = 2.2976. **Most nucleophilic atom:** N (amino nitrogen), f⁻ = 0.2045. High f⁺ at nitrogen (1.6697) reflects donor-π stabilization; ortho-carbons dominate aromatic f⁺. Full per-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor) reported for all 14 atoms. Integrity: trustworthy = true; all schema and conservation checks passed.</prose>
